title: lespedeza patens var. macrantha
intro: Lespedeza patens var. macrantha, also known as Japanese clover or bigflower bush clover, is a perennial legume native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and is believed to have potential health benefits such as lowering blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, and can also be used in decoctions and infusions to harness its medicinal properties. Lespedeza patens var. macrantha is also used in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is considered to have a sweet and cooling effect on the body.
